narrative:
Southwest Local Sd (Hamilton) school district has 20,607 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -6.8% D−R vs -34.5% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
